'/tribe', ]; // Adicionar no início para ter prioridade array_unshift($folders, $theme_folder); return $folders; } /** * Modifica o HTML do template de data para eventos da categoria "edital" * * Intercepta a renderização do template de data e substitui o conteúdo * para mostrar "Edital disponível até: [data]" em vez do formato padrão. */ add_filter('tribe_template_html:events/v2/list/event/date', 'bureau_it_tec_filter_edital_date_html', 10, 4); add_filter('tribe_template_html:events/v2/widgets/widget-events-list/event/date', 'bureau_it_tec_filter_edital_date_html', 10, 4); function bureau_it_tec_filter_edital_date_html($html, $file, $name, $template) { // Obter o evento do contexto do template $context = $template->get_values(); $event = isset($context['event']) ? $context['event'] : null; if (!$event) { return $html; } // Verificar se é um edital if (!has_term('edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event->ID)) { return $html; } // Obter a data de término do evento $event_obj = tribe_get_event($event->ID); if (!$event_obj || !isset($event_obj->dates->end)) { return $html; } // Formatar a data $end_date = $event_obj->dates->end; $formatted_date = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); // Substituir o conteúdo do elemento time mantendo a estrutura HTML $new_date_html = 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted_date) . ''; // Usar regex para substituir o conteúdo do elemento time $html = preg_replace( '/(]*>).*?(<\/time>)/s', '$1' . $new_date_html . '$2', $html ); return $html; } /** * Filtro alternativo para modificar as variáveis do template antes da renderização * * Este filtro modifica o objeto $event diretamente antes de ser passado ao template. */ add_filter('tribe_events_views_v2_view_template_vars', 'bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars', 10, 2); function bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars($template_vars, $view) { if (!isset($template_vars['events']) || !is_array($template_vars['events'])) { return $template_vars; } foreach ($template_vars['events'] as $key => $event) { if (!is_object($event) || !isset($event->ID)) { continue; } // Verificar se é edital if (!has_term('edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event->ID)) { continue; } // Marcar o evento como edital para uso nos templates $template_vars['events'][$key]->is_edital = true; // Se o evento tem datas, adicionar a data formatada if (isset($event->dates->end)) { $formatted_date = wp_date('j \d\e F', $event->dates->end->getTimestamp()); $template_vars['events'][$key]->edital_date_text = 'Edital disponível até: ' . $formatted_date; } } return $template_vars; }

Este dequeue em * priority 999 remove os assets residuais após todos os enqueues. * * Handles documentados: inspecionados via curl em /sobre-a-concertacao/ * em 2026-03-16 com TEC 6.15.12.2 + TEC Pro 7.7.14. * * @since 2.1.1 */ add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'bureau_it_tec_dequeue_on_non_tec_pages', 999); function bureau_it_tec_dequeue_on_non_tec_pages() { if ( bureau_it_page_uses_tec() ) { return; } // CSS handles do TEC core + TEC Pro (sem conditional nativa) $css_handles = [ 'tribe-events-pro-mini-calendar-block-styles', 'tec-variables-skeleton', 'tec-variables-full', 'tribe-events-v2-virtual-single-block', 'tribe-events-v2-single-skeleton', 'tribe-events-v2-single-skeleton-full', 'tec-events-elementor-widgets-base-styles', ]; // JS handles do TEC core + TEC Pro $js_handles = [ 'tec-user-agent', ]; foreach ( $css_handles as $handle ) { wp_dequeue_style( $handle ); wp_deregister_style( $handle ); } foreach ( $js_handles as $handle ) { wp_dequeue_script( $handle ); wp_deregister_script( $handle ); } // Remove o link de iCal alternate no remove_action( 'wp_head', [ 'Tribe__Events__iCal', 'maybe_add_ical_link' ], 2 ); if ( function_exists( 'tribe' ) && tribe( 'tec.iCal' ) ) { remove_action( 'wp_head', [ tribe( 'tec.iCal' ), 'maybe_add_ical_link' ], 2 ); } } add_action('tribe_events_single_event_before_the_content', 'bureau_it_custom_event_display'); add_action('tribe_events_list_widget_before_the_event_title', 'bureau_it_custom_event_display'); function bureau_it_custom_event_display($event = null) { $event = $event ?? tribe_get_event(); if (!$event) return; $categories = wp_get_post_terms($event->ID, 'tribe_events_cat'); if (!is_wp_error($categories)) { foreach ($categories as $category) { if (strtolower($category->slug) === 'edital') { // Custom logic here break; } } } } add_filter('tec_events_get_time_range_separator', function($separator) { return (strpos($separator, '#') !== false) ? 'tec_occurrences'; if ( $wpdb->get_var( "SHOW TABLES LIKE '$table'" ) === $table ) { $real_id = $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$table} WHERE occurrence_id = %d LIMIT 1", $event_id ) ); if ( ! $real_id ) { // Try treating the ID as composite: the real occurrence_id may be the last digits // TEC provisonal IDs: subtract 1e7 offset used internally $candidate = absint( $event_id ) - 10000000; if ( $candidate > 0 ) { $real_id = $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$table} WHERE occurrence_id = %d LIMIT 1", $candidate ) ); } } if ( $real_id ) { $event_id = $real_id; } } } return has_term( 'edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event_id ); } /** * Filtro para modificar a data exibida dos eventos na lista * Funciona para eventos da categoria "edital" em qualquer view/shortcode * * @since 1.4.2 */ add_filter('tribe_events_event_schedule_details', 'bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule', 10, 2); function bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule($schedule, $event_id) { if (!bureau_it_is_edital($event_id)) { return $schedule; } $event = tribe_get_event($event_id); if (!$event || !isset($event->dates->end)) { return $schedule; } $end_date = $event->dates->end; $formatted = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted) . ''; } /** * Formata a data de um evento para exibição customizada * * Para editais: "Edital disponível até: X de Mês" * Para eventos: Formato padrão com correções de localização * * @param WP_Post $event Objeto do evento com propriedades do tribe_get_event() * @param bool $add_prefix Adicionar "De " no início para eventos normais * @return string HTML formatado da data */ function bureau_it_format_event_date($event, $add_prefix = true) { if (bureau_it_is_edital($event)) { $end_date = $event->dates->end; $formatted = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted) . input.content: post_content, 'tribe_events' ) ) { return true; } // Widget Elementor nativo do TEC $elementor_data = get_post_meta( $post->ID, '_elementor_data', true ); if ( $elementor_data && str_contains( $elementor_data, 'tec_elementor_widget' ) ) { return true; } return false; } return false; } /** * Descarrega assets do TEC em páginas que não usam eventos. * * O TEC carrega ~275KB de JS + CSS em todas as páginas por padrão via * should_enqueue_frontend(). O filter tribe_events_assets_should_enqueue_frontend * já cobre tribe_is_event_query() + shortcode [tribe_events], mas não detecta * widgets Elementor nativos do TEC (widgetType: tec_elementor_widget_events_view). * * Este filtro estende a lógica padrão adicionando detecção do widget Elementor. * * @since 2.1.1 * @param bool $should_enqueue Valor atual do TEC (já true para event queries/shortcodes) * @return bool */ add_filter('tribe_events_assets_should_enqueue_frontend', 'bureau_it_tec_assets_should_enqueue_frontend'); function bureau_it_tec_assets_should_enqueue_frontend( $should_enqueue ) { // Se o TEC já decidiu carregar (event query, shortcode clássico), respeitar if ( $should_enqueue ) { return true; } // Estender com detecção de widget Elementor nativo do TEC return bureau_it_page_uses_tec(); } /** * Dequeue explícito dos assets TEC/TEC Pro em páginas sem eventos. * * O filtro tribe_events_assets_should_enqueue_frontend cobre os assets * principais do TEC, mas o TEC Pro registra alguns assets sem conditional * (ex: tribe-events-pro-mini-calendar-block-styles). Este dequeue em * priority 999 remove os assets residuais após todos os enqueues. * * Handles documentados: inspecionados via curl em /sobre-a-concertacao/ * em 2026-03-16 com TEC 6.15.12.2 + TEC Pro 7.7.14. * * @since 2.1.1 */ add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', 'bureau_it_tec_dequeue_on_non_tec_pages', 999); function bureau_it_tec_dequeue_on_non_tec_pages() { if ( bureau_it_page_uses_tec() ) { return; } // CSS handles do TEC core + TEC Pro (sem conditional nativa) $css_handles = [ 'tribe-events-pro-mini-calendar-block-styles', 'tec-variables-skeleton', 'tec-variables-full', 'tribe-events-v2-virtual-single-block', 'tribe-events-v2-single-skeleton', 'tribe-events-v2-single-skeleton-full', 'tec-events-elementor-widgets-base-styles', ]; // JS handles do TEC core + TEC Pro $js_handles = [ 'tec-user-agent', ]; foreach ( $css_handles as $handle ) { wp_dequeue_style( $handle ); wp_deregister_style( $handle ); } foreach ( $js_handles as $handle ) { wp_dequeue_script( $handle ); wp_deregister_script( $handle ); } // Remove o link de iCal alternate no remove_action( 'wp_head', [ 'Tribe__Events__iCal', 'maybe_add_ical_link' ], 2 ); if ( function_exists( 'tribe' ) && tribe( 'tec.iCal' ) ) { remove_action( 'wp_head', [ tribe( 'tec.iCal' ), 'maybe_add_ical_link' ], 2 ); } } add_filter('tec_events_get_time_range_separator', function($separator) { return (strpos($separator, '#') !== false) ? ' - ' : $separator; }); add_filter('tec_events_get_date_time_separator', function($separator) { return (strpos($separator, '#') !== false) ? ' @ ' : $separator; }); /** * Resolve um occurrence ID do TEC Custom Tables V1 para o post_id real. * * O TEC V1 usa IDs provisórios (ex: 10001315) nas templates em vez dos post IDs * reais (ex: 89737). O offset interno é 10.000.000 + occurrence_id. * * @since 2.2.0 * @param int $event_id ID que pode ser provisório ou real * @return int ID real do post (ou o $event_id original se não for possível resolver) */ function bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id( $event_id ) { $event_id = (int) $event_id; if ( $event_id <= 0 ) { return $event_id; } // Verificar cache antes de qualquer consulta $cache_key = 'bureau_it_tec_post_id_' . $event_id; $cached = wp_cache_get( $cache_key, 'bureau_it_tec' ); if ( false !== $cached ) { return (int) $cached; } $resolved = $event_id; if ( function_exists( 'tec_get_post_id_from_occurrence_id' ) ) { // TEC API oficial (se disponível) $real = tec_get_post_id_from_occurrence_id( $event_id ); if ( $real ) { $resolved = (int) $real; } } else { // Fallback: consulta direta em wp_tec_occurrences global $wpdb; $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'tec_occurrences'; // Verificar existência da tabela via information_schema (SQL-safe) $table_exists = (bool) $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = %s LIMIT 1", $table ) ); if ( $table_exists ) { // Tentar direto pelo occurrence_id $real = (int) $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$table} WHERE occurrence_id = %d LIMIT 1", $event_id ) ); if ( ! $real ) { // TEC provisional IDs: offset interno de 10.000.000 + occurrence_id // Ex: 10001315 - 10000000 = 1315 (occurrence_id real) $candidate = $event_id - 10000000; if ( $candidate > 0 ) { $real = (int) $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$table} WHERE occurrence_id = %d LIMIT 1", $candidate ) ); } } if ( $real > 0 ) { $resolved = $real; } } } wp_cache_set( $cache_key, $resolved, 'bureau_it_tec', 3600 ); return $resolved; } /** * Verifica se um evento é da categoria "edital" * * Suporta IDs provisórios do TEC Custom Tables V1, onde $event->ID pode ser * um occurrence ID composto (ex: 10001315) em vez do post_id real (ex: 89737). * * @since 1.0.0 * @param WP_Post|int $event Objeto do evento ou ID (real ou provisório) * @return bool */ function bureau_it_is_edital( $event ) { $event_id = is_object( $event ) ? (int) $event->ID : (int) $event; if ( $event_id <= 0 ) { return false; } $event_id = bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id( $event_id ); return has_term( 'edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event_id ); } /** * Filtro para modificar a data exibida dos eventos na lista. * Usado em views legadas / shortcodes V1. * * Para V2 (list view, widget), o template override date.php já aplica a lógica. * Este filtro mantém compatibilidade com shortcodes antigos e V1. * * @since 1.4.2 */ add_filter('tribe_events_event_schedule_details', 'bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule', 10, 2); function bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule( $schedule, $event_id ) { if ( ! bureau_it_is_edital( $event_id ) ) { return $schedule; } // Usar ID resolvido para buscar o evento $real_id = bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id( (int) $event_id ); $event = tribe_get_event( $real_id ); if ( ! $event || ! isset( $event->dates->end ) ) { return $schedule; } $formatted = wp_date( 'j \d\e F', $event->dates->end->getTimestamp() ); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html( $formatted ) . ''; } /** * Filtro para short_schedule_details (usado em widgets legados). * * @since 1.4.2 */ add_filter('tribe_events_event_short_schedule_details', 'bureau_it_filter_edital_short_schedule', 10, 2); function bureau_it_filter_edital_short_schedule( $schedule, $event_id ) { if ( ! bureau_it_is_edital( $event_id ) ) { return $schedule; } $real_id = bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id( (int) $event_id ); $event = tribe_get_event( $real_id ); if ( ! $event || ! isset( $event->dates->end ) ) { return $schedule; } $formatted = wp_date( 'j \d\e F', $event->dates->end->getTimestamp() ); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html( $formatted ) . ''; } /** * Formata a data de um evento para exibição customizada * * Para editais: "Edital disponível até: X de Mês" * Para eventos: Formato padrão com correções de localização * * @since 1.0.0 * @param WP_Post $event Objeto do evento com propriedades do tribe_get_event() * @param bool $add_prefix Adicionar "De " no início para eventos normais * @return string HTML formatado da data */ function bureau_it_format_event_date( $event, $add_prefix = true ) { if ( bureau_it_is_edital( $event ) ) { if ( ! isset( $event->dates->end ) ) { return ''; } $formatted = wp_date( 'j \d\e F', $event->dates->end->getTimestamp() ); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html( $formatted ) . ''; } // Eventos normais: aplicar correções de formato $date_text = wp_kses_post( $event->schedule_details->value() ); // Correções de localização pt-BR $date_text = str_replace( 'Virtual Evento', 'Evento Virtual', $date_text ); $date_text = preg_replace( '/\(UTC-3\)/i', 'Horário de São Paulo', $date_text ); // Corrigir formato da data: "Month DD @ HH:MM" → "DD de Month às HH:MM" $date_text = preg_replace_callback( '/(\w+)\s(\d+)\s@\s(\d+):(\d+)/i', function ( $matches ) { return $matches[2] . ' de ' . $matches[1] . ' às ' . $matches[3] . ':' . $matches[4]; }, $date_text ); // Substituir separador de intervalo $date_text = str_replace( ' - até ' ) !== false ) { $date_text = 'De ' . $date_text; } return $date_text; }

' @ ' : $separator; }); /** * Verifica se um evento é da categoria "edital" * * @param WP_Post|int $event Objeto do evento ou ID * @return bool */ function bureau_it_is_edital($event) { $event_id = is_object($event) ? $event->ID : $event; // TEC Custom Tables V1: provisional occurrence IDs are not real post IDs. // Resolve to the actual post_id before checking terms. if ( function_exists( 'tec_get_post_id_from_occurrence_id' ) ) { $real_id = tec_get_post_id_from_occurrence_id( $event_id ); if ( $real_id ) { $event_id = $real_id; } } elseif ( is_object( $event ) && isset( $event->_tec_occurrences ) && ! empty( $event->_tec_occurrences ) ) { // $event->_tec_occurrences may hold the real post_id $first = reset( $event->_tec_occurrences ); if ( isset( $first->post_id ) ) { $event_id = $first->post_id; } } else { // Fallback: query wp_tec_occurrences directly global $wpdb; $table = $wpdb->prefix . 'tec_occurrences'; if ( $wpdb->get_var( "SHOW TABLES LIKE '$table'" ) === $table ) { $real_id = $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$table} WHERE occurrence_id = %d LIMIT 1", $event_id ) ); if ( ! $real_id ) { // Try treating the ID as composite: the real occurrence_id may be the last digits // TEC provisonal IDs: subtract 1e7 offset used internally $candidate = absint( $event_id ) - 10000000; if ( $candidate > 0 ) { $real_id = $wpdb->get_var( $wpdb->prepare( "SELECT post_id FROM {$table} WHERE occurrence_id = %d LIMIT 1", $candidate ) ); } } if ( $real_id ) { $event_id = $real_id; } } } return has_term( 'edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event_id ); } /** * Filtro para modificar a data exibida dos eventos na lista * Funciona para eventos da categoria "edital" em qualquer view/shortcode * * @since 1.4.2 */ add_filter('tribe_events_event_schedule_details', 'bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule', 10, 2); function bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule($schedule, $event_id) { if (!bureau_it_is_edital($event_id)) { return $schedule; } $event = tribe_get_event($event_id); if (!$event || !isset($event->dates->end)) { return $schedule; } $end_date = $event->dates->end; $formatted = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted) . ''; } /** * Filtro alternativo para short_schedule_details (usado em widgets) * * @since 1.4.2 */ add_filter('tribe_events_event_short_schedule_details', 'bureau_it_filter_edital_short_schedule', 10, 2); function bureau_it_filter_edital_short_schedule($schedule, $event_id) { if (!bureau_it_is_edital($event_id)) { return $schedule; } $event = tribe_get_event($event_id); if (!$event || !isset($event->dates->end)) { return $schedule; } $end_date = $event->dates->end; $formatted = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted) . ''; } /** * Formata a data de um evento para exibição customizada * * Para editais: "Edital disponível até: X de Mês" * Para eventos: Formato padrão com correções de localização * * @param WP_Post $event Objeto do evento com propriedades do tribe_get_event() * @param bool $add_prefix Adicionar "De " no início para eventos normais * @return string HTML formatado da data */ function bureau_it_format_event_date($event, $add_prefix = true) { if (bureau_it_is_edital($event)) { $end_date = $event->dates->end; $formatted = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); return 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted) . ''; } // Eventos normais: aplicar correções de formato $date_text = $event->schedule_details->value(); // Correções de localização pt-BR $date_text = str_replace('Virtual Evento', 'Evento Virtual', $date_text); $date_text = str_replace('-3', 'Horário de São Paulo', $date_text); // Corrigir formato da data: "Month DD @ HH:MM" → "DD de Month às HH:MM" $date_text = preg_replace_callback( '/(\w+)\s(\d+)\s@\s(\d+):(\d+)/i', function($matches) { return $matches[2] . ' de ' . $matches[1] . ' às ' . $matches[3] . ':' . $matches[4]; }, $date_text ); // Substituir separador de intervalo $date_text = str_replace(' - até ') !== false) { $date_text = 'De ' . $date_text; } return $date_text; }

content.text: Agora `tribe/hooks.php` — remover filtros redundantes e o hook do código morto:

input.content:
<?php
/**
 * The Events Calendar - Hooks customizados
 *
 * Este arquivo é carregado automaticamente pelo TEC quando existe no diretório tribe/ do tema.
 * Contém filtros e ações para customizar o comportamento do calendário.
 *
 * @package HelloElementorChild
 * @subpackage TEC
 * @author Daniel Cambría + Claude Code
 * @version 1.1.0
 */

// Prevent direct access
if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

/**
 * Registra o diretório de templates do tema para o TEC Views V2
 *
 * Isso garante que os templates customizados em tribe/events/v2/ sejam carregados
 * em todos os contextos (shortcodes, páginas de arquivo, widgets, etc.)
 */
add_filter('tribe_template_path_list', 'bureau_it_tec_register_template_path', 15, 2);
function bureau_it_tec_register_template_path($folders, $template) {
    $theme_folder = [
        'id'       => 'hello-elementor-child-tribe',
        'priority' => 5, // Prioridade alta para carregar antes do plugin
        'path'     => get_stylesheet_directory() . '/tribe',
    ];

    // Adicionar no início para ter prioridade
    array_unshift($folders, $theme_folder);

    return $folders;
}

toolUseResult.originalFile: 'hello-elementor-child-tribe', 'priority' => 5, // Prioridade alta para carregar antes do plugin 'path' => get_stylesheet_directory() . '/tribe', ]; // Adicionar no início para ter prioridade array_unshift($folders, $theme_folder); return $folders; } /** * Modifica o HTML do template de data para eventos da categoria "edital" * * Intercepta a renderização do template de data e substitui o conteúdo * para mostrar "Edital disponível até: [data]" em vez do formato padrão. */ add_filter('tribe_template_html:events/v2/list/event/date', 'bureau_it_tec_filter_edital_date_html', 10, 4); add_filter('tribe_template_html:events/v2/widgets/widget-events-list/event/date', 'bureau_it_tec_filter_edital_date_html', 10, 4); function bureau_it_tec_filter_edital_date_html($html, $file, $name, $template) { // Obter o evento do contexto do template $context = $template->get_values(); $event = isset($context['event']) ? $context['event'] : null; if (!$event) { return $html; } // Verificar se é um edital if (!has_term('edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event->ID)) { return $html; } // Obter a data de término do evento $event_obj = tribe_get_event($event->ID); if (!$event_obj || !isset($event_obj->dates->end)) { return $html; } // Formatar a data $end_date = $event_obj->dates->end; $formatted_date = wp_date('j \d\e F', $end_date->getTimestamp()); // Substituir o conteúdo do elemento time mantendo a estrutura HTML $new_date_html = 'Edital disponível até: ' . esc_html($formatted_date) . ''; // Usar regex para substituir o conteúdo do elemento time $html = preg_replace( '/(]*>).*?(<\/time>)/s', '$1' . $new_date_html . '$2', $html ); return $html; } /** * Filtro alternativo para modificar as variáveis do template antes da renderização * * Este filtro modifica o objeto $event diretamente antes de ser passado ao template. */ add_filter('tribe_events_views_v2_view_template_vars', 'bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars', 10, 2); function bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars($template_vars, $view) { if (!isset($template_vars['events']) || !is_array($template_vars['events'])) { return $template_vars; } foreach ($template_vars['events'] as $key => $event) { if (!is_object($event) || !isset($event->ID)) { continue; } // Verificar se é edital if (!has_term('edital', 'tribe_events_cat', $event->ID)) { continue; } // Marcar o evento como edital para uso nos templates $template_vars['events'][$key]->is_edital = true; // Se o evento tem datas, adicionar a data formatada if (isset($event->dates->end)) { $formatted_date = wp_date('j \d\e F', $event->dates->end->getTimestamp()); $template_vars['events'][$key]->edital_date_text = 'Edital disponível até: ' . $formatted_date; } } return $template_vars; }

content.text:
Tudo funcionando. Resumo de todas as correções aplicadas:

---

### Correções aplicadas

**`inc/events-calendar.php` → v2.2.0**

| # | Issue | Fix |
|---|-------|-----|
| CRITICAL | `SHOW TABLES LIKE '$table'` (SQL injection) | Substituído por `information_schema` com `$wpdb->prepare()` |
| HIGH | Tipo não validado em `$event_id` antes de `-10000000` | Todos os IDs agora castados com `(int)` antes de uso |
| HIGH | `tribe_get_event($event_id)` com ID provisório nos filtros de schedule | Filtros agora chamam `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` antes do `tribe_get_event()` |
| MEDIUM | Null dereference em `$event->dates->end` | Guard `isset()` adicionado em `bureau_it_format_event_date()` |
| MEDIUM | Sem cache: query por evento a cada render | Extraído `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` com `wp_cache_get/set` (TTL 1h) |
| MEDIUM | Código morto `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` | Função e hooks removidos |
| LOW | `-3` substituído com `str_replace` muito genérico | Trocado por `preg_replace('/\(UTC-3\)/i', ...)` |
| LOW | `schedule_details->value()` sem escaping | Adicionado `wp_kses_post()` |

**`tribe/hooks.php` → v1.1.0**

| # | Issue | Fix |
|---|-------|-----|
| MEDIUM | Filtro `tribe_template_html:events/v2/list/event/date` redundante com template override | Removido |
| MEDIUM | Filtro do widget também redundante | Removido |
| MEDIUM | `bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars` (vars de template) desnecessário | Removido |

message.content: envie 2 agentes para auditas as correções e saúde atual geral do events calendar no projeto

input.description: Audit corrections applied to events-calendar
input.prompt:
Audit ALL corrections applied to the Events Calendar customization in the WordPress child theme at:
`/Users/dcambria/scripts/server-tools/v2/docker-dev/sites/concertacao/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/`

Files to audit:
1. `inc/events-calendar.php` (v2.2.0)
2. `tribe/hooks.php` (v1.1.0)
3. `tribe/events/v2/list/event/date.php`

Context of what was fixed:
- `bureau_it_is_edital()` was broken because TEC Custom Tables V1 passes provisional occurrence IDs (e.g. 10001315) instead of real post IDs (89737). Fix: `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` helper that resolves via `wp_tec_occurrences` table.
- SQL injection: `SHOW TABLES LIKE '$table'` replaced with `information_schema` + `$wpdb->prepare()`
- Dead code `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` removed
- Redundant `tribe_template_html` filters removed from `tribe/hooks.php`
- Added `wp_cache_get/set` with 1h TTL in `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()`
- Fixed `tribe_get_event()` calls in schedule filters to use resolved post ID
- Added null guard for `$event->dates->end`
- Fixed brittle `-3` string replace to `preg_replace('/\(UTC-3\)/i', ...)`

Audit tasks:
1. Read all three files completely
2. Verify each fix was actually applied correctly (don't trust the summary — read the code)
3. Check for any NEW issues introduced by the corrections
4. Check if `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` is correctly shared between `bureau_it_is_edital()` and the schedule filters (no code duplication)
5. Verify `wp_cache_set` cache key is consistent with `wp_cache_get` (same key, same group)
6. Check if the `information_schema` query is correct syntax for MariaDB 11
7. Check if `tribe/hooks.php` still has the `tribe_template_path_list` filter (it must be kept — without it template overrides don't work)
8. Check if `bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars` was fully removed (not just the function, but also the `add_filter` call)

Return a detailed verification report: what was correctly fixed, what remains problematic, and any new issues.

input.description: Audit overall TEC health in project
input.prompt:
Perform a comprehensive health audit of The Events Calendar (TEC) customization in the WordPress child theme project at:
`/Users/dcambria/scripts/server-tools/v2/docker-dev/sites/concertacao/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/`

Scope: ALL files related to TEC customization — not just the recently fixed ones.

Files to inspect:
1. `tribe/` directory — list all files, read each one
2. `inc/events-calendar.php`
3. `functions.php` — sections related to TEC (search for `tec`, `tribe`, `calendar`, `bureau_it_tec`)
4. `style.css` — look for `.tribe-event-edital-date` and any other TEC-related CSS
5. Any other PHP files under `inc/` that might touch TEC

Health audit checklist:
1. **Template override inventory**: List all TEC template overrides in `tribe/events/v2/`. Are they all necessary? Are any outdated/redundant?
2. **Function inventory**: List all `bureau_it_*` functions related to TEC. Are they all called somewhere? Any orphans?
3. **Hook/filter inventory**: List all `add_filter` and `add_action` calls related to TEC. Any duplicates? Any hooks that conflict?
4. **CSS coverage**: Is `.tribe-event-edital-date` styled? Is the styling appropriate?
5. **PHP syntax**: Any obvious syntax errors or unclosed blocks?
6. **Version consistency**: Do `@version` tags match across files?
7. **Dead files**: Any `.php` files in `tribe/` that are overrides but no longer serve a purpose?
8. **Missing overrides**: Based on the edital feature, are there any TEC views (month view tooltip, single event, widget) where edital logic might be missing?

Return a full health report with an inventory table of all TEC-related files and their status.

content.text:
Audit ALL corrections applied to the Events Calendar customization in the WordPress child theme at:
`/Users/dcambria/scripts/server-tools/v2/docker-dev/sites/concertacao/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/`

Files to audit:
1. `inc/events-calendar.php` (v2.2.0)
2. `tribe/hooks.php` (v1.1.0)
3. `tribe/events/v2/list/event/date.php`

Context of what was fixed:
- `bureau_it_is_edital()` was broken because TEC Custom Tables V1 passes provisional occurrence IDs (e.g. 10001315) instead of real post IDs (89737). Fix: `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` helper that resolves via `wp_tec_occurrences` table.
- SQL injection: `SHOW TABLES LIKE '$table'` replaced with `information_schema` + `$wpdb->prepare()`
- Dead code `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` removed
- Redundant `tribe_template_html` filters removed from `tribe/hooks.php`
- Added `wp_cache_get/set` with 1h TTL in `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()`
- Fixed `tribe_get_event()` calls in schedule filters to use resolved post ID
- Added null guard for `$event->dates->end`
- Fixed brittle `-3` string replace to `preg_replace('/\(UTC-3\)/i', ...)`

Audit tasks:
1. Read all three files completely
2. Verify each fix was actually applied correctly (don't trust the summary — read the code)
3. Check for any NEW issues introduced by the corrections
4. Check if `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` is correctly shared between `bureau_it_is_edital()` and the schedule filters (no code duplication)
5. Verify `wp_cache_set` cache key is consistent with `wp_cache_get` (same key, same group)
6. Check if the `information_schema` query is correct syntax for MariaDB 11
7. Check if `tribe/hooks.php` still has the `tribe_template_path_list` filter (it must be kept — without it template overrides don't work)
8. Check if `bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars` was fully removed (not just the function, but also the `add_filter` call)

Return a detailed verification report: what was correctly fixed, what remains problematic, and any new issues.

Now let me verify the fixes systematically. I'll create a detailed audit report:

## DETAILED AUDIT REPORT: Events Calendar Customization Fixes

### FILE 1: `inc/events-calendar.php` (v2.2.0)

**AUDIT FINDINGS:**

✅ **FIXED: `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` Helper (Lines 153-214)**
- Correctly implemented with proper structure
- Cache is working: `wp_cache_get()` at line 162 with key `'bureau_it_tec_post_id_' . $event_id` and group `'bureau_it_tec'`
- Cache is SET at line 211 with SAME key and group: `wp_cache_set( $cache_key, $resolved, 'bureau_it_tec', 3600 )`
- TTL is consistent: 1 hour (3600 seconds)
- SQL injection FIXED: Uses `$wpdb->prepare()` at lines 181-183 for table existence check
  - Query: `"SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = %s LIMIT 1"`
  - This is **correct MariaDB 11 syntax**
- Fallback logic working correctly:
  - First tries TEC API (`tec_get_post_id_from_occurrence_id()`) at line 171
  - Falls back to occurrence_id lookup at line 188-190
  - Handles provisional ID offset (10.000.000) at line 196
- Null guards: Present at line 156 (`if ( $event_id <= 0 )`)

✅ **FIXED: `bureau_it_is_edital()` (Lines 226-236)**
- Now uses `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` at line 233
- Resolves provisional IDs BEFORE checking taxonomy
- Proper null guard at lines 229-231
- Clean implementation: resolves ID, then checks `has_term()`

✅ **FIXED: `bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule()` (Lines 248-264)**
- Uses resolved ID at line 254: `$real_id = bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id( (int) $event_id )`
- Calls `tribe_get_event( $real_id )` with resolved ID at line 255
- **Null guard added** at line 257: `if ( ! $event || ! isset( $event->dates->end ) )`
- This prevents errors from NULL `$event->dates->end`

✅ **FIXED: `bureau_it_filter_edital_short_schedule()` (Lines 272-287)**
- Same pattern as above
- Uses resolved ID at line 277
- Calls `tribe_get_event()` with resolved ID at line 278
- Null guard at line 280: `if ( ! $event || ! isset( $event->dates->end ) )`

✅ **FIXED: `bureau_it_format_event_date()` (Lines 300-335)**
- Correct regex for UTC-3 replacement at line 315:
  - `preg_replace( '/\(UTC-3\)/i', 'Horário de São Paulo', $date_text )`
  - Uses case-insensitive flag `/i`, proper escaping of parentheses
  - **This fixes the brittle `-3` string replace issue**
- Null guards: Line 302 checks `! isset( $event->dates->end )`
- Safe output: Uses `esc_html()` at lines 307 and `wp_kses_post()` at line 311

**CODE DUPLICATION CHECK:** `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` is shared correctly:
- Used by `bureau_it_is_edital()` (line 233)
- Used by `bureau_it_filter_edital_schedule()` (line 254)
- Used by `bureau_it_filter_edital_short_schedule()` (line 277)
- **No duplication detected** ✅

**DEAD CODE CHECK:** No evidence of `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` function ✅

---

### FILE 2: `tribe/hooks.php` (v1.1.0)

**AUDIT FINDINGS:**

✅ **CRITICAL: `tribe_template_path_list` Filter (Lines 25-37) — PRESENT**
- This filter is **correctly maintained**
- Function: `bureau_it_tec_register_template_path()` registers the theme's `tribe/` directory as a template path
- Priority set to 15 for high priority loading
- **Without this filter, template overrides would NOT work** — this is essential and should never be removed

✅ **REDUNDANCY CHECK: No dead `tribe_template_html` filters**
- File contains ONLY the essential `tribe_template_path_list` filter
- No redundant filters present ✅

⚠️ **CONCERN: Missing complementary functions**
- This file is extremely minimal (only 38 lines)
- The main logic is in `inc/events-calendar.php`
- This is architecturally sound: separates TEC-specific hooks (in `tribe/hooks.php`) from utility functions (in `inc/events-calendar.php`)
- **No issue here, just architectural note**

---

### FILE 3: `tribe/events/v2/list/event/date.php`

**AUDIT FINDINGS:**

✅ **CLEAN TEMPLATE OVERRIDE (Lines 19)**
- Calls `bureau_it_format_event_date( $event, true )`
- Passes resolved event object (TEC template variables are already resolved by TEC Views V2)
- Output safely escaped via `wp_kses_post()` at line 25

✅ **PROPER VARIABLE USAGE:**
- Line 17: `$event->dates->start->format()` — correct property access with null safety (template is only rendered when event is valid)
- Line 19: Function call to shared utility function

**NO ISSUES DETECTED** ✅

---

### CRITICAL VERIFICATION CHECKLIST

| Item | Status | Evidence |
|------|--------|----------|
| `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` correctly implemented? | ✅ PASS | Lines 153-214, cache keys match, SQL injection fixed |
| Cache key consistent (get/set same key)? | ✅ PASS | `'bureau_it_tec_post_id_' . $event_id` in both places |
| `information_schema` query valid for MariaDB 11? | ✅ PASS | Correct syntax, uses `$wpdb->prepare()`, `DATABASE()` function |
| `tribe_template_path_list` filter present? | ✅ PASS | Line 25 in `tribe/hooks.php`, correctly implemented |
| `bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars` removed? | ✅ PASS | No trace found in any file |
| Null guard for `$event->dates->end`? | ✅ PASS | Lines 257, 280, 302 |
| UTC-3 regex fix applied? | ✅ PASS | Line 315 uses proper case-insensitive regex |
| No code duplication in resolve logic? | ✅ PASS | Function called 3 times, single implementation |
| Dead code `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` removed? | ✅ PASS | Not present in any file |
| Redundant `tribe_template_html` filters removed? | ✅ PASS | `tribe/hooks.php` contains only essential filter |

---

### SUMMARY OF CORRECTIONS

**All documented fixes were correctly applied:**

1. ✅ **SQL Injection Fixed:** `SHOW TABLES LIKE` → `information_schema` + `$wpdb->prepare()`
2. ✅ **Provisional ID Resolution:** `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` helper handles both direct occurrences and 10M offset
3. ✅ **Cache Implementation:** 1-hour TTL with consistent key/group across get/set
4. ✅ **Null Guards:** Added for `$event->dates->end` in all schedule filters
5. ✅ **Brittle String Replace Fixed:** UTC-3 now uses case-insensitive regex with proper escaping
6. ✅ **Dead Code Removed:** `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` not present
7. ✅ **Redundancy Eliminated:** Only essential `tribe_template_path_list` filter remains
8. ✅ **Code Sharing:** `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` correctly shared without duplication

**NO NEW ISSUES DETECTED** — Code is clean, safe, and follows WordPress standards.

Audit ALL corrections applied to the Events Calendar customization in the WordPress child theme at:
`/Users/dcambria/scripts/server-tools/v2/docker-dev/sites/concertacao/wordpress/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/`

2. `tribe/hooks.php` (v1.1.0)

Context of what was fixed:
- `bureau_it_is_edital()` was broken because TEC Custom Tables V1 passes provisional occurrence IDs (e.g. 10001315) instead of real post IDs (89737). Fix: `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` helper that resolves via `wp_tec_occurrences` table.
- SQL injection: `SHOW TABLES LIKE '$table'` replaced with `information_schema` + `$wpdb->prepare()`
- Dead code `bureau_it_custom_event_display()` removed
- Redundant `tribe_template_html` filters removed from `tribe/hooks.php`
- Added `wp_cache_get/set` with 1h TTL in `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()`
- Fixed `tribe_get_event()` calls in schedule filters to use resolved post ID
- Added null guard for `$event->dates->end`
- Fixed brittle `-3` string replace to `preg_replace('/\(UTC-3\)/i', ...)`

Audit tasks:
1. Read all three files completely
2. Verify each fix was actually applied correctly (don't trust the summary — read the code)
3. Check for any NEW issues introduced by the corrections
4. Check if `bureau_it_tec_resolve_post_id()` is correctly shared between `bureau_it_is_edital()` and the schedule filters (no code duplication)
5. Verify `wp_cache_set` cache key is consistent with `wp_cache_get` (same key, same group)
6. Check if the `information_schema` query is correct syntax for MariaDB 11
7. Check if `tribe/hooks.php` still has the `tribe_template_path_list` filter (it must be kept — without it template overrides don't work)
8. Check if `bureau_it_tec_modify_edital_event_vars` was fully removed (not just the function, but also the `add_filter` call)

Return a detailed verification report: what was correctly fixed, what remains problematic, and any new issues.

All critical components are properly integrated, well-documented, and follow the Bureau IT `bureau_it_*` prefix convention. No syntax errors detected. All functions are called from appropriate contexts.

- **date.php** - Displays edital deadline OR normal event date (Necessary for edital feature)

- **event-categories.php** - Falls back to fetching categories if not provided (Necessary)
- **event-categories/header.php** - Minimal pass-through (Necessary for structure)

### Single Event Page Recommendation

**Finding:** Single event pages (when viewing a full event via `/evento-slugs/`) display event details. The Elementor widget (`tribe/.../elementor/start-date.php`) handles date display, but the static view template might need override if:
- Site displays events outside Elementor (e.g., custom single-event-tec.php)
- Need to ensure consistent edital messaging on full event pages

**Recommendation:** ⚠️ **LOW PRIORITY** - Only override `tribe/events/v2/single-event.php` if users report missing edital text on full event pages. Currently not a blocker.
